name: Grave/Digger, Halo
description:
"Are we truly doing the right thing?"

"Are we fighting for what is right or are we just blindly following orders?"

Hello people, high effort Grave/Digger bot. Have fun!

All of this artwork goes to the great artists in the grave/digger discord. Im unfortunately not going to credit them as it would take too long for me to find them.

Thanks for 1K messages

Im thinking about making an entire series, tell me what i should do for the next bot (can be grave/digger or just anything at all)
